metadata.title: Antigravity – Kelajak Texnologiyalari
metadata.description: Futuristik levitatsiya va kosmik transportni kashf eting. Zamonaviy, minimalistik va qorong‘u rejimli veb-sayt.

hero.title: Antigravity – Kelajakka uchish
hero.subtitle: Levitatsiya texnologiyasi bilan olamning chegaralarini yengib chiqing

howItWorks.description: Magnetik maydon va antigravitatsiya motorlari asosida tasavvur qilinmagan yuqoriga ko‘tarilishlarni ta’minlaydi.

blocks.title: Magnitli levitatsiya
blocks.content: Kuchli superkonduktorli magnitlar yordamida yer qobig‘ini mag‘rurlaydi.

items.name: Heavy‑Lifter
items.description: Yuk tashish uchun 5 tonnaga qadar ko‘taradi.

items.name: Sky‑Pod
items.description: Kosmik turistik kapsula, 48 soat davomida orbitada.

About.content: Antigravity – ilm-fan va muhandislikni birlashtirgan, insoniyatni yangi bosqichga olib chiqadigan brend.

hero.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-center text-[#00FFFF]
hero.title: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold
hero.subtitle: text-xl md:text-2xl mt-4
hero.ctaButton: mt-8 px-6 py-3 bg-[#00FFFF] text-gray-900 font-semibold rounded hover:bg-[#00e5e5] transition
